name: DocuSeal
description: Open source document filling and signing
compose:
name: slashnode-docuseal
services:
  server:
    image: docuseal/docuseal:3.1.1
    container_name: docuseal-server
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    depends_on:
      - db
    environment:
      DATABASE_URL: postgresql://docusealuser:docusealpass@docuseal-db:5432/docuseal?sslmode=disable
    volumes:
      - server_data-app:/data/docuseal
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8387:3000
  db:
    image: postgres:17.3
    container_name: docuseal-db
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      PGDATA: /var/lib/postgresql/pgdata
      POSTGRES_DB: docuseal
      POSTGRES_USER: docusealuser
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: docusealpass
    volumes:
      - db_data-db:/var/lib/postgresql
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  server_data-app:
    name: slashnode-docuseal_server_data-app
  db_data-db:
    name: slashnode-docuseal_db_data-db
